name: I have a pre-existing condition but work made my breathing worse, can I get comp in Utah?
description: Yes for aggravation; need medical proof of work worsening it.[5]

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing condition but work made my breathing worse, can I get comp in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for aggravation; need medical proof of work worsening it.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if work substantially aggravated it, causing new disability.[5] Workers comp covers aggravations of pre-existing issues.[2] Key factors: Medical panel opinion on causation, work exposure proof. Get independent medical exam; Utah lawyers can refer to panels for strong evidence.
